name: Boistfort School
description: Boistfort School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Curtis, WA. The court surface is wood. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Northwest Sports Hub
description: Northwest Sports Hub is a place to play pickleball in Centralia, WA. There are 14 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $100 cash fee, yearly dues July through June, must be 18+ and sign a waiver, three tournaments are included in the fee

name: Thorbeckes Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at Thorbeckes Athletic Club in Centralia, WA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water.
